title: curriculum/NN-name/module.json
description: Per-module manifest. The stable layer, written when the course spine is built. See docs/FORMAT.md.

phaseName.description: Optional display name for the phase; any module in the phase may carry it.

runtime.$comment: Free-form on purpose: 'what the scaffold needs to run' (browser-safe, node, ...) — the set grows, so no enum.

volatileLayer.$comment: Both are live: module 00 ships its volatile layer 'present'; 01+ generate it at start.

bossCheck.description: Optional; true on the module that ends a phase gate.
